HediffDef.label: temporal slow
HediffDef.description: The pawn is trapped in twist time.

HediffDef.label: Avenging Protocol
HediffDef.description: The unit's combat protocols are overclocked, significantly increasing combat effectiveness. This effect can stack.

HediffDef.label: Tactical Data Web: Kaldalis
HediffDef.description: The number in brackets is how many backup Legionnaire bodies are on this map. Each backup body increases Kaldalis's melee splash damage by 67% of the initial hit (e.g. 0 bodies = 67% splash, 1 body = 133%, 2 bodies = 200% to nearby enemies).

HediffDef.label: Tactical Data Web: Taldarin
HediffDef.description: The number in brackets is how many Purifier Immortals (backup bodies) are in your faction on this map. Each backup body adds extra damage: vs buildings, one extra attack hit; vs pawns, one extra AoE pulse to the main target and nearby enemies.
